entry.value:
{"viewModel":"siderbar","fullModeNewWindow":false,"skillIndex":{"skills":{"brainstorming":{"name":"brainstorming","description":"You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/skills/brainstorming","directoryTree":"brainstorming/

When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/skills/pptx/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/skills/pptx","directoryTree":"pptx/

This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills","directoryTree":"find-skills/

Provides comprehensive guidance for managing CodeFlicker extension settings, including query, search, and update operations via Debug Server API.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings","directoryTree":"settings/

Provides comprehensive guidance for creating, updating, deleting, git-managing, cloning from remote repositories, and organizing CodeFlicker skills throughout their entire lifecycle.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/wangjibin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager","directoryTree":"skill-manager/
